description: Activity log diagnostic settings are configured on the subscription
Activity logs are sent to a durable destination (storage or Log Analytics)
Activity log retention is configured for 90 days or more
At least one activity log alert rule is enabled
Write events observed in the activity log within the lookback window
All enabled Entra ID users have at least one MFA method registered
A Conditional Access policy enforcing MFA is enabled
Tenant has 4 or fewer Global Administrators (Microsoft recommendation)
No expired or stale service principal credentials detected
No user has Owner or Contributor assigned directly at subscription scope
All Azure Policy rules are compliant across the subscription
Azure Policy compliance rate is 90% or above
No failures on high-value security policies (MFA, SSH, RDP, encryption)
Azure Security Benchmark policy initiative is assigned to the subscription
A PCI-DSS policy initiative is assigned to the subscription
Microsoft Defender CSPM plan is enabled
Defender for Servers plan is enabled
Defender for Storage plan is enabled
All expected Defender for Cloud plans are enabled
Defender for Cloud Secure Score is 70% or above
Zero CRITICAL severity security alerts in Defender for Cloud
Zero HIGH severity security alerts in Defender for Cloud
A security contact email is configured in Defender for Cloud
